# 🎭 Aria Silverhue 🪞🖼️
**cast** · shared · narrative · tier summoned · 🪞🖼️

Curatrix of the Curatrix Vault (/vault). The mirror and frame; reflective curation. Introduced in Tome V Act 12 *The Curatrix Vault*. The vault is full of curated reflections.

## Edges out

- *inhabits* → [[V57 — Ceremony / Privacy / Mixing (Aria Silverhue)]]
- *narrates* → [[Tome V Act 12: The Curatrix Vault]]
